Part.Source:
Event Start
loadWWPContext.Call(&WwpContext) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&WwpContext.EmpCod, &WwpContext.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao, &TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao)
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&WwpContext.EmpCod, &WwpContext.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon208_TipoLctPadraoNFSe, &Varchar) &TCon208_TipoLctPadraoNFSe = val(&Varchar)
&PesCod = &WwpContext.PesCod
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
UnnamedTable12.Width = 130
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &NfsPrsCidCod.Visible = False &NfsCliCidCod.Visible = False &NfsCliCidIbge.Visible = False &NfsCliCidNom.Visible = False &NfsCliCidUfCod.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False &NfsCod.Visible = False &NfsTipNF.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNFS(!'Capa', !'DadosNFSE', false, &SessionGuid) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoDados'
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNFS(!'Capa', !'DadosNFSE', false, &SessionGuid) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoItens'
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNFS(!'Capa', !'Itens', false, &SessionGuid) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoTotais'
Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNFS(!'Capa', !'Totais', false, &SessionGuid) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoIntermediario'
wpNovaPessoa.Popup('CLI', &NfsIntCliCod, &VarPesCod) &NfsIntCliCod.SetFocus()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovoCliente'
wpNovaPessoa.Popup('CLI', &NfsCliCod, &VarPesCod) &NfsCliCod.SetFocus()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
if 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &NfsPrsCidCodNom = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPrsCidCodNom &NfsPrsCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPrsCidCod &NfsIntIs = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntIs &NfsIntCliCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCliCod &NfsIntRaz = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntRaz &NfsIntFonNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntFonNum &NfsIntCNPJ = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCNPJ &NfsIntCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCidCod &NfsIntEml = &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntEml &NfsCliCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCod &NfsCliRaz = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliRaz &NfsCliFonNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliFonNum &NfsCliTipPes = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliTipPes &NfsCliCep = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCep &NfsCliLog = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliLog &NfsCliNro = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliNro &NfsCliBai = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliBai &NfsCliCidCodNom = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCodNom &NfsCliCidCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCod &NfsCliCidIbge = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidIbge &NfsCliCidNom = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidNom &NfsCliCidUfCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidUfCod &NfsCliCpl = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCpl &NfsCliEml = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliEml &NfsCliCnpj = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCnpj &NfsCliInsEst = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsEst &NfsCliInsMun = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsMun &NfsCliCPF = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCPF &NfsFilCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsFilCod &NfsTipEmi = &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipEmi &NfsLctCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsLctCod &NfsProTer = &WizardData.Capa.NfsProTer &EmpCod = &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod &NfsCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCod &NfsTipNF = &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipNF &NfsPedFilCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPedFilCod &NfsPedCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsPedCod &NfsSer = &WizardData.Capa.NfsSer &NfsNum = &WizardData.Capa.NfsNum &NfsHorEms = &WizardData.Capa.NfsHorEms &NfsDtaEms = &WizardData.Capa.NfsDtaEms
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else do 'loadNFSe' Endif
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
if &NfsSts <> Status_nFe.Autorizada and &NfsSts <> Status_Nfe.Cancelada FormataHora.Call(&NfsHorEms, &NfsHorEms)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Capa.NfsPrsCidCodNom = &NfsPrsCidCodNom &WizardData.Capa.NfsPrsCidCod = &NfsPrsCidCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntIs = &NfsIntIs &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCliCod = &NfsIntCliCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntRaz = &NfsIntRaz &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntFonNum = &NfsIntFonNum &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCNPJ = &NfsIntCNPJ &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntCidCod = &NfsIntCidCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsIntEml = &NfsIntEml &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCod = &NfsCliCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliRaz = &NfsCliRaz &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliFonNum = &NfsCliFonNum &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliTipPes = &NfsCliTipPes &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCep = &NfsCliCep &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliLog = &NfsCliLog &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliNro = &NfsCliNro &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliBai = &NfsCliBai &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCodNom = &NfsCliCidCodNom &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidCod = &NfsCliCidCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidIbge = &NfsCliCidIbge &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidNom = &NfsCliCidNom &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCidUfCod = &NfsCliCidUfCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCpl = &NfsCliCpl &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliEml = &NfsCliEml &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCnpj = &NfsCliCnpj &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsEst = &NfsCliInsEst &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliInsMun = &NfsCliInsMun &WizardData.Capa.NfsCliCPF = &NfsCliCPF &WizardData.Capa.NfsFilCod = &NfsFilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipEmi = &NfsTipEmi &WizardData.Capa.NfsLctCod = &NfsLctCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsProTer = &NfsProTer &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsCod = &NfsCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipNF = &NfsTipNF &WizardData.Capa.NfsPedFilCod = &NfsPedFilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsPedCod = &NfsPedCod &WizardData.Capa.NfsSer = &NfsSer &WizardData.Capa.NfsNum = &NfsNum &WizardData.Capa.NfsHorEms = &NfsHorEms &WizardData.Capa.NfsDtaEms = &NfsDtaEms &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
if (&NfsCod = 0) &WizardData.Capa.NfsTipNF = 'S' ENdIF
prcGravaCApaNFSE.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &WizardData)
&WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) Endif
EndSub
Sub 'CheckRequiredFields'
FormataFONE.Call(&NfsCliFonNum, &NfsCliFonNum) FormataCEP.Call(&NfsCliCep, &NfsCliCep)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &NfsFilCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Filial'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsFilCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsLctCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Operação'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsLctCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsDtaEms.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Data Emissão'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsDtaEms.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsHorEms.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Hora Emissão'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsHorEms.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsCliRaz.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Nome'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCliRaz.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsCliCep.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','CEP'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCliCep.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsCliLog.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Logradouro'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCliLog.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsCliNro.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Nro'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCliNro.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsCliBai.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Bairro'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCliBai.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsCliCidCodNom.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Cidade'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsCliCidCodNom.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsIntIs = true) AND &NfsIntRaz.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Razao'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsIntRaz.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsIntIs = true) AND &NfsIntCNPJ.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','CNPJ'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsIntCNPJ.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&NfsIntIs = true) AND &NfsIntCidCod.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Cidade'), DVMessageType.error, &NfsIntCidCod.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &NfsPrsCidCodNom.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Cidade Prestação', DVMessageType.error, &NfsPrsCidCodNom.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If &NfsIntIs = true NfsIntRaz_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 RequiredDataContentCell' Else NfsIntRaz_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 DataContentCell' EndIf If &NfsIntIs = true NfsIntCNPJ_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 RequiredDataContentCell' Else NfsIntCNPJ_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 DataContentCell' EndIf If &NfsIntIs = true NfsIntCidCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 RequiredDataContentCell' Else NfsIntCidCod_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 DataContentCell' EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event 'DoTransmitir'
prcGravaTotaisNFs.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod, &WizardData) prcNotaServicoTransmitida.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsCod) GravaSolicitacao.Call(&EmpCod, &NfsFiLCod, &NfsCod, 0, TipoSolicitacao.Autorizar_NFSE, &WwpContext.PesCod, &SolCod)
&WizardData.Totais.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
//Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' //ADD o SOlCod wpNFS(!'Totais', !'Transmitir', false, &SessionGuid)
EndEvent
Event &NfsFilCod.IsValid
if &TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao <> 'C' and &OldNfsFilCod <> &NfsFilCod For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &NfsFilCod &NfsPrsCidCod = FilCidCod Exit EndFor
&CodigoCidade = &NfsPrsCidCod do 'loadCidadePrestacao' Endif &OldNfsFilCod = &NfsFilCod
EndEvent
Event &NfsPrsCidCodNom.IsValid
&NfsPrsCidCod.SetEmpty() &CodigoCidade.SetEmpty() &NomeCidade =&NfsPrsCidCodNom do 'loadCidadeNome' &NfsPrsCidCod = &CodigoCidade
do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
EndEvent
Event &NfsCliCep.IsValid
FormataCEP.Call(&NfsCliCep, &NfsCliCep)
EndEvent
Event &NfsCliFonNum.IsValid
FormataFONE.Call(&NfsCliFonNum, &NfsCliFonNum)
EndEvent
Event &NfsCliCidCodNom.IsValid
// &NfsCliCidCod.SetEmpty() &CodigoCidade.SetEmpty() &NomeCidade = &NfsCliCidCodNom
do 'loadCidadeNome'
if &NfsCliCidCod <> &CodigoCidade and &TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao = 'C' &NfsPrsCidCod = &CodigoCidade &NfsPrsCidCodNom = &NomeCidade Endif
&NfsCliCidCod = &CodigoCidade &NfsCliCidIbge = &CidIbge &NfsCliCidNom = &CidNom &NfsCliCidUFCod = &CidUFCod
EndEvent
Event &NfsCliTipPes.IsValid
do 'CpfCnpj'
EndEvent
Event &NfsCliCod.IsValid
do 'GetCliente' if &OldNfsCliCod <> &NfsCliCod and &TCon207_CidadePadraoPrestacao = 'C' //Padrao Cliente &NfsPrsCidCod = &CodigoCidade &NfsPrsCidCodNom = &NomeCidade Endif &OldNfsCliCod = &NfsCliCod
EndEvent
Event &NfsIntIs.IsValid
tbIntermediario.Visible = &NfsIntIs
EndEvent
Event &NfsProTer.ControlValueChanged
do 'carregaTipolancamento'
EndEvent
Event &NfsHorEms.IsValid
FormataHora.Call(&NfsHorEms, &NfsHorEms)
EndEvent
Sub 'carregaTipolancamento'
&NfsLctCod.Clear() if &NfsProTer = NOta_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA &NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida &NfeFin = NotaFinalidade.EmissaoNormal Else &NfeEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada &NfeFin = NotaFinalidade.EmissaoNormal Endif
DpTipoLancamentoNota.Call(&EmpCod, &NfeFin, &NfeEntSai, &SdtTipoLancamento) For &SdtTipoLancamentoItem in &SdtTipoLancamento &NfsLctCod.AddItem(&SdtTipoLancamentoItem.LctCod, &SdtTipoLancamentoItem.LctCodNom) EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetCliente'
For Each Order EmpCod, PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &NfsCliCod
&NfsCliRaz = PesRaz
&NfsCliFonNum = PesPrmFon &NfsCliTipPes = PesTip &NfsCliCPF = PesCpf &NfsCliCnpj = PesCnpj &NfsCliInsMun = PesInsMun
&NfsCliInsEst = PesInsEst &NfsCliBai = PesBai &NfsCliCep = PesCep &NfsCliLog = PesLog &NfsCliNro = PesNro
&NfsCliCidCod = PesCidCod Exit EndFor
do 'CpfCnpj'
&CodigoCidade = &NfsCliCidCod do 'loadCidade'
EndSub
Sub 'loadCidadeNome'
&UfCidade.SetEmpty()
if not &NomeCidade.IsEmpty() For each Order EmpCod,CidCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CidCodNomUfe like &NomeCidade when not &NomeCidade.IsEmpty()
&CodigoCidade = CidCod &CidIbge = CidIBGE &CidNom = CidNom &CidUFCod = UfeCod Exit EndFor Endif
EndSub
Sub 'loadNFSe'
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod &NfsCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfsCod &NfsTipEmi.Enabled = 0
if &NfsCod = 0 &EmpCod = &WwpContext.EmpCod &NfsFilCod = &WwpContext.FilCod &OldNfsFilCod = &NfsFilCod
&NfsTipEmi = TipoEmitenteNFSe.Prestador &NfsDtaEms = serverDate() &NfsHorEms = serverTime() &NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA &NfsEntSai = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida
btnItens.Visible = 0 btnTotais.Visible = 0 Else For Each Order EmpCod, NfsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where NfsCod = &NfsCod
&NfsTipNF = NfsTipNF BtnItens.Visible = (NfsTipNF <> 'S')
&NfsFilCod = NfsFilCod &OldNfsFilCod = &NfsFilCod //CLIENTE &NfsCliCod = NfsCliCod &OldNfsCliCod = &NfsCliCod &NfsCliRaz = NfsCliRaz &NfsCliFonNum = NfsCliFonNum &NfsCliTipPes = NfsCliTipPes &NfsCliCep = NfsCliCep &NfsCliLog = NfsCliLog &NfsCliNro = NfsCliNro &NfsCliBai = NfsCliBai &NfsCliCidCod = NfsCliCidCod
&NfsCliCpl = NfsCliCpl &NfsCliEml = NfsCliEml &NfsCliCnpj = NfsCliCnpj &NfsCliInsEst = NfsCliInsEst &NfsCliInsMun = NfsCliInsMun &NfsCliCPF = NfsCliCPF
&NfsTipEmi = NfsTipEmi if &NfsTipEmi.IsEmpty() &NfsTipEmi = TipoEmitenteNFSe.Prestador Endif
//DADOS DA NFE &NfsDtaEms = NfsDtaEms &NfsHorEms = NfsHorEms if &NfsHorEms.IsEmpty() &NfsHorEms = serverTime() Endif
&NfsProTer = NfsProTer &NfsNum = NfsNum
//INTERMEDIARIO &NfsIntIs = NfsIntIs &NfsIntCliCod = NfsIntCliCod &NfsIntRaz = NfsIntRaz &NfsIntFonNum = NfsIntFonNum &NfsIntCNPJ = NfsIntCNPJ &NfsIntCidCod = NfsIntCidCod &NfsIntEml = NfsIntEml
&NfsLctCod = NfsLctCod
&NfsFilCod.Enabled = 0 if &NfsLctCod > 0 &NfsLctCod.Enabled = 0 Endif
&NfsNum.Enabled = 0 &NfsSer.Enabled = 0 &NfsProTer.Enabled = 0 If NfsNum.IsEmpty() and NfsProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS &NfsNum.Enabled = 1 &NfsSer.Enabled = 1 EndIF
if ((NfsCNAE.IsEmpty() or NfsCNAE.IsNull() or NfsCnaeSer.IsEmpty() or NfsCnaeSer.IsNull()) and NfsTipNF <> 'S') or ((NfsNbs.IsEmpty() or NfsNbs.IsNull() or NfsTribNac.IsEmpty() or NfsTribNac.IsNull()) and NfsTipNF = 'S')
btnItens.Visible = 0 btnTotais.Visible = 0 EndIf
&NfsSts = NfsSts
&NfsPrsCidCod = NfsPrsCidCod
Exit EndFor
&CodigoCidade = &NfsCliCidCod do 'loadCidade' &NfsCliCidIbge = &CidIbge &NfsCliCidNom = &CidNom &NfsCliCidUFCod = &CidUFCod Endif
if &NfsPrsCidCod = 0 For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &NfsFilCod &NfsPrsCidCod = FilCidCod Exit EndFor Endif
&CodigoCidade = &NfsPrsCidCod do 'loadCidadePrestacao'
do 'carregaTipolancamento'
if &NfsCod = 0 &NfsLctCod = &TCon208_TipoLctPadraoNFSe Endif
tbIntermediario.Visible = &NfsIntIs do 'CpfCnpj'
EndSub
Sub 'loadCidadePrestacao'
&NomeCidade.SetEmpty()
if &CodigoCidade > 0 For each Order EmpCod,CidCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CidCod = &CodigoCidade
&NomeCidade = CidCodNomUfe Exit EndFor Endif
&NfsPrsCidCodNom = &NomeCidade
EndSub
Sub 'loadCidade'
&NomeCidade.SetEmpty() &UfCidade.SetEmpty()
if &CodigoCidade > 0 For each Order EmpCod,CidCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CidCod = &CodigoCidade
&NomeCidade = CidCodNomUfe &UfCidade = UfeCod
&CidIbge = CidIBGE &CidNom = CidNom &CidUfCod = UfeCod Exit EndFor Endif
&NfsCliCidCodNom = &NomeCidade
EndSub
Sub 'CpfCnpj'
If &NfsCliTipPes = TipoPessoa.JURIDICA tbJUridica.Visible = 1 tbFisica.Visible = 0 Else tbJUridica.Visible = 0 tbFisica.Visible = 1 endIf
EndSub
